title: Surgeon Vacancy at Abbott India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Abbott India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
